Package neqsim.process.safety.barrier

Class TR2237Templates

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.barrier.TR2237Templates
public final class TR2237Templates extends Object
Factory for TR2237-style performance-standard templates.

The templates provide a starting register for agent-assisted standards reviews. They deliberately contain acceptance criteria and barrier links, but no project evidence; agents that read technical documentation should attach DocumentEvidence items before crediting the barriers.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team

  • Method Details

    • createOnshoreTemplate

      public static BarrierRegister createOnshoreTemplate()
      Creates an onshore process-safety barrier register template.
      Returns:
      barrier register with TR2237-style performance standards and starter barriers

    • createNorsokS001Mapping

      public static Map<String,String> createNorsokS001Mapping()
      Creates a starter mapping between template performance standards and NORSOK S-001 topics.
      Returns:
      ordered mapping from performance-standard id to relevant NORSOK S-001 topic

    • addStandardWithBarrier

      private static void addStandardWithBarrier(BarrierRegister register, String id, String title, String safetyFunction, PerformanceStandard.DemandMode demandMode, double targetPfd, double availability, double proofTestIntervalHours, double responseTimeSeconds, String acceptanceCriterion, SafetyBarrier.BarrierType barrierType)
      Adds one performance standard and a linked starter barrier to a register.
      Parameters:
      register - register receiving the standard and barrier
      id - performance standard identifier
      title - performance standard title
      safetyFunction - safety function description
      demandMode - demand mode
      targetPfd - target PFD, or NaN when not applicable
      availability - required availability, or NaN when not applicable
      proofTestIntervalHours - proof test interval in hours, or NaN when not applicable
      responseTimeSeconds - response time in seconds, or NaN when not applicable
      acceptanceCriterion - acceptance criterion text
      barrierType - barrier type
